training_status: very active (physical job, 20-28k steps daily, constant lifting 40-60lbs)

benefits.description: Lost 37 lbs from August 12, 2025 (268 lbs) to January 13, 2026 (231 lbs)
Improved appetite control and no longer binge eating
No longer wanting to drink alcohol

protocol_notes: Switched from Tirzepatide to Retatrutide with small dose of Semaglutide to prolong appetite suppression. Results better than Tirzepatide alone. Works physically demanding job (70+ hours/week, 20-28k steps daily, constant lifting 40-60lbs). Minimal sleep/rest. No structured exercise routine. Interested in improving further with jogging, meal prep, gym 3x/week. Current weight 231 lbs, down from 268 lbs (5 months).
